---
title: "Portfolio"
---

## Welcome

This site is a landing page for my work and related repositories.

Use it to:

- Link to other GitHub repositories
- Share rendered analyses from `.qmd` and `.Rmd` files
- Publish project notes and reports as HTML

## Featured Links

- [Project Repo 1](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo-1)
- [Project Repo 2](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo-2)
- [Project Repo 3](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo-3)

## Rendered Pages

- [Example report](reports/example-report.html)

Replace the placeholders above with your real projects and generated pages.
